# React E-Commerce Dashboard Project

This is a React-based authentication e-commerce dashboard project with the following specifications:

## Project Requirements
- React (Vite) with TypeScript
- React Router for navigation  
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Authentication system with localStorage
- Protected routes
- Product listing from external API (Fake Store API)
- Cart management
- User profile editing
- Session management (5-minute timeout)
- Fully responsive design

## Tech Stack
- React 18
- TypeScript
- Vite
- React Router DOM
- Tailwind CSS
- Axios for API calls
- React Context for state management

## Authentication Flow
- User registration with localStorage
- Login with session timeout
- Protected dashboard access
- Profile management

## Features
- Product browsing with external API
- Shopping cart functionality
- User authentication and authorization
- Responsive UI design
- Error handling and loading states
